# The Fisherman Garden Vegan Restaurant & Cafe

> An Bang Beach's first all-vegan restaurant, in a tranquil garden by the sea in Hội An. Buddha bowls, vegan burgers, phở, pizza, smoothies, juices & cocktails — family-run, plant-based, plastic-free.

## Key facts

- Cuisine: Vegan, Asian fusion, Cafe
- Location: An Bang Beach, Hội An Tây, Đà Nẵng, Vietnam
- Hours: Daily undefined–undefined
- Price range: $
- Phone: +84 905 660 623
- Reservations: Yes
- Website: https://the-fisherman-garden-vegan-restaurant-cafe.netlify.app/

## Profiles

- https://www.tripadvisor.com.vn/Restaurant_Review-g298082-d13861647-Reviews-The_Fisherman_Vegan_Restaurant-Hoi_An_Quang_Nam_Province.html
- https://www.instagram.com/thefisherman_vegan/
- https://www.facebook.com/theFishermanAnBang/?locale=vi_VN
- https://www.instagram.com/p/Blr02xBHfzu/

## Good to know

- Family friendly
- Free Wi-Fi
- Spacious garden
- Dogs welcome

## Full menu

- Vegan Pho — 70,000 ₫ — Vietnamese noodle soup with vegetables, herbs and soy sauce.
- Chickpea curry — 90,000 ₫ — Curried chickpea in coconut tomato base with brown rice and salad.
- Buddha bowl — 95,000 ₫ — Brown rice with chickpea, pumpkin, avocado, black beans and salad.
- Special Vegan Pizza — 120,000 ₫ — Housemade vegan cheese, tomato, capsicum, vegan ham, corn and olives.
- Special of the Fisherman starter — 140,000 ₫ — Falafel, spring rolls, salad, bread, potatoes with hummus, guacamole and chutney.
- Vegan pancakes — 70,000 ₫ — Banana oatmeal pancakes with fruit, coconut and house coconut yogurt.
- Peanut butter toasts — 60,000 ₫ — Peanut butter, strawberry, banana and chia seeds on toasted brown bread.
- Beetroot hummus toasts — 60,000 ₫ — Housemade beetroot hummus and grilled mushroom on toasted brown bread.
- Avo toasts — 60,000 ₫ — Avocado smashed with lime on toasted brown bread.
- Spicy chickpea toast — 60,000 ₫ — Chickpea, chilli, tomato chutney and vegan yogurt on toast.
- Fresh fruit bowl — 60,000 ₫ — Seasonal fruits and mint.
- Strawesome smoothie bowl — 70,000 ₫ — Banana and strawberry base with peanut butter, oats, fruit, chia, coconut and yogurt.
- Sunrise smoothie bowl — 80,000 ₫ — Mango smoothie base with peanut butter, oats, fruit, chia, coconut and yogurt.
- Pink Love smoothie bowl — 80,000 ₫ — Red dragon fruit and banana base with peanut butter, oats, fruit and yogurt.
- Brekky burrito — 80,000 ₫ — Tofu scramble, black bean, capsicum, tomato and avocado in house wrap.

- Tofu scrambled with veggies — 80,000 ₫ — Tofu scramble with turmeric, capsicum, onion, tomato and mushroom with brown bread.
